global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a prominent call to action and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting a weekend escape deal at a low price.

elements.label: Light gray background
elements.description: A light gray rectangular background that fills the top portion of the ad.

elements.label: Main content area
elements.description: A large white rectangular area in the center with rounded edges, designed to hold key information.

elements.label: Escape this weekend
elements.description: Bold, large black text stating 'Escape this weekend' prominently in the center.

elements.label: Additional details
elements.description: Smaller black text providing additional details about the offer, placed below the main headline.

elements.label: Price information
elements.description: Black text displaying the price, formatted in a clear and readable manner.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded black button with white text that says 'Try for free', positioned centrally.

elements.label: Promotional headline
elements.description: A bold, attention-grabbing headline at the bottom of the ad, emphasizing the weekend escape offer.
elements.text_content: Escape this weekend €19Hgel Alclat tap Try for free

elements.label: WayPoint logo
elements.description: A small logo at the top left corner, featuring the text 'WayPoint' in a modern font.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small yellow badge at the top right corner with the text 'SALE' in bold letters.
